Class: PMTilesLayer

bemap.PMTilesLayer(options)

Layer for PMTiles vector tile sources. Handles PMTiles protocol registration and authenticated access.

Constructor

new PMTilesLayer(options)

Parameters:
Name Type Description
options Object See below.
Properties
Name Type Description
url String PMTiles file URL (e.g. 'https://server.com/tiles.pmtiles').
style String Style JSON URL or object for rendering the vector tiles.
token String Authentication token (e.g. JWT) sent as X-Session-Token header.
tokenHeader String Custom header name for authentication (default: 'X-Session-Token').
sourceName String Source name used in the style (default: 'tiles').
maxZoom Number Max zoom level for the source (default: 14).
glyphs String URL template for font glyphs.
Source:
  • bemap-model/bemap-pmtilesLayer.js, line 23

Extends

  • bemap.Layer
